Description: Emergency posture that freezes all outgoing transfers except treasury-controlled ones, while still preserving blacklist checks.

CallingFunctions.Name: transfer
CallingFunctions.EncodedValues: address from, address to, uint256 value, uint256 blockTime, uint256 fromUnlockTime, uint256 fromBlacklistFlag, uint256 toBlacklistFlag, uint256 treasuryBypass, uint256 maxTransfer

CallingFunctions.Name: transferFrom
CallingFunctions.FunctionSignature: transferFrom(address from, address to, uint256 value)
CallingFunctions.EncodedValues: address from, address to, uint256 value, uint256 blockTime, uint256 fromUnlockTime, uint256 fromBlacklistFlag, uint256 toBlacklistFlag, uint256 treasuryBypass, uint256 maxTransfer

Rules.Name: Transfer Blacklist Check
Rules.Description: Block transfers that involve blacklisted addresses even during emergency mode.

Rules.Name: Transfer Emergency Freeze Check
Rules.Description: Allow only treasury-originated transfers while emergency freeze is active.

Rules.Name: TransferFrom Blacklist Check
Rules.Description: Block transferFrom calls that involve blacklisted addresses even during emergency mode.

Rules.Name: TransferFrom Emergency Freeze Check
Rules.Description: Allow only treasury-originated transferFrom calls while emergency freeze is active.
